Author: SekhmetAnkh
Name: GBR Monster Hunter
Description: Listens to GatherBuddy Reborn/Vulcan execution plans, detects missing drop-only materials using Vulcan/GatherBuddy mob-drop locations with local fallbacks, waits for GBR gathering to finish, equips a selected combat job, routes to the hunted monster, coordinates with RotationSolverReborn or checks WrathCombo readiness, and resumes Vulcan only when GBR Monster Hunter owns the pause.
Punchline: Route to drop-only materials from crafting plans.
